title: Quantification of chitooligosaccharides by FACE method: Determination of combinatory effects of mouse chitinases
author: Kimura, Umeyama, et al.

steps.title: Preparation of the size marker
steps.instruction: 1.GlcNAc oligomers (Seikagaku Corporation, Tokyo, Japan) were used as a standard.2.The oligosaccharide was dissolved in water to a concentration of 1 mM.3.The standard solution was labeled by the method described above.
